mapper.sql: r.id, r.application_id, r.reviewer_id, r.action, r.opinion, r.created_at, r.updated_at, r.is_deleted
u.real_name AS reviewer_name, au.real_name AS applicant_name, c.building, c.room_number
mapper.select:
SELECT ,
FROM yx_application_review r LEFT JOIN yx_user u ON r.reviewer_id = u.id AND u.is_deleted = FALSE LEFT JOIN yx_classroom_application a ON r.application_id = a.id AND a.is_deleted = FALSE LEFT JOIN yx_user au ON a.applicant_id = au.id AND au.is_deleted = FALSE LEFT JOIN yx_classroom c ON a.classroom_id = c.id AND c.is_deleted = FALSE WHERE r.application_id = #{applicationId} AND r.is_deleted = FALSE

SELECT ,
FROM yx_application_review r LEFT JOIN yx_user u ON r.reviewer_id = u.id AND u.is_deleted = FALSE LEFT JOIN yx_classroom_application a ON r.application_id = a.id AND a.is_deleted = FALSE LEFT JOIN yx_user au ON a.applicant_id = au.id AND au.is_deleted = FALSE LEFT JOIN yx_classroom c ON a.classroom_id = c.id AND c.is_deleted = FALSE WHERE r.id = #{id} AND r.is_deleted = FALSE
mapper.update: UPDATE yx_application_review SET is_deleted = TRUE, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
